     The Numbers Business Report

The Girl in the Spider’s Web (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,828,555Details
International Box Office $20,154,787
Worldwide Box Office $34,983,342
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,326,414
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,738,191
Total $4,064,605
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Lisbeth Salander may not need the world, but the world needs Lisbeth Salander. The look. That tattoo. Those skills. That determination. The fierce vigilante star Lisbeth Salander is everything we need in a modern hero: smart, resourceful, driven by demons but not defined by them, and possessing a me-against-the-universe attitude that has been more than enough to take down abusive men, hidden killers, and anyone foolish enough to go up against her.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,810,112 (52.7% of total gross)
Legs:1.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$43,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,929 opening theaters/2,929 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,467,567

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 9th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: October 25th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Sweden)
October 26th, 2018 (Wide) (Poland)
October 31st, 2018 (Wide), released as Millennium - Quello che non uccide (Italy)
October 31st, 2018 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: January 22nd, 2019 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, language and some sexual content/nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2551 (Cert #51437), 10/31/2018)
Running Time: 117 minutes
Franchise: Millennium (English)
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Sequel With Lead Character Recast
Plot point: Cyber Warfare, Government Corruption, Hackers, Internet, Revenge, Weapons of Mass Destruction
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Cantillon Company, Yellow Bird, Scott Rudin Productions, Pascal Pictures, Columbia Pictures, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Regency Enterprises, Rose Line Productions Limited, Studio Babelsberg
Production Countries: United States, Sweden
Languages: English

Synopsis

Lisbeth Salander may not need the world, but the world needs Lisbeth Salander. The look. That tattoo. Those skills. That determination. The fierce vigilante star Lisbeth Salander is everything we need in a modern hero: smart, resourceful, driven by demons but not defined by them, and possessing a me-against-the-universe attitude that has been more than enough to take down abusive men, hidden killers, and anyone foolish enough to go up against her.
